description_long: This striking sconce features a starburst or sputnik-inspired design, with numerous elongated, tapered rods radiating outward from a central metallic core. The rods appear to be made of frosted or translucent glass, each capped and supported by metallic gold or brass fixtures. The central hub is a polished metallic sphere, from which the rods extend symmetrically in all directions, creating a dynamic and eye-catching visual effect. The fixture is suspended from a chain and canopy, suggesting it is intended for ceiling mounting. The overall aesthetic is both modern and retro, reminiscent of mid-century modern lighting with a luxurious twist. The combination of metallic and glass materials gives it a sophisticated, glamorous appearance suitable for upscale urban interiors.
description: A starburst sconce with radiating frosted glass rods and a polished gold metallic core, suspended from a chain. The design is modern and luxurious, evoking mid-century style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical starburst pattern with glass rods radiating evenly from the metallic core.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the depth and three-dimensional arrangement of the rods, revealing more of the metallic fixtures.
description_view_2: Another angled view, showing the rods' varying lengths and the interplay of glass and metal elements.
description_view_3: Back view maintains the starburst symmetry, with the chain and canopy clearly visible at the top.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture features a modern, mid-century sputnik design with a luxurious gold finish and frosted glass rods. Its geometric, radiating form is both decorative and functional, evoking retro-futuristic elegance.
